title: 2BHK · "Owner going abroad"
address: HAL 3rd Stage, Near Metro, Indiranagar, Bangalore
description: Luxurious 2 BHK apartment. Owner going abroad, hence renting out very cheap. Rent ₹18,000 only! Modular kitchen, AC, leather sofas, high speed wifi. Fully loaded luxury. Please pay a minor refundable token to reserve and hold the flat. WhatsApp me directly at the number to visit. No calls.

title: 2BHK · "Urgent, token to hold"
description: Urgent listing! Beautiful 2BHK flat in the posh Defence Colony. Only ₹16,000 rent. Direct dealing. Need to pay token amount of ₹5,000 to hold this flat today as there is a huge queue. Very urgent.

title: 2BHK · "Prime Indiranagar"
description: Beautiful 2BHK flat in Prime Indiranagar area. Extremely cheap rent because owner needs to rent it out urgently this week. Modern amenities included. First come first served.

title: 2BHK · "Owner Relocating to UK"
description: Owner relocating to UK immediately. Fully furnished flat available at throwaway price. Do not call, direct WhatsApp only on my number. Must pay refundable safety deposit token of Rs 6000 before viewing is scheduled. No brokers.

title: 1BHK · "Military Officer Transfer"
address: Jeevan Bima Nagar Main Road, Bangalore
description: I am an army military officer transferred from Bangalore. Renting my fully furnished 1BHK. Rent Rs 9000 only. To see flat, you must pay Rs 3000 gate-pass fee which is 100% refundable immediately after visiting. Genuine tenants only. WhatsApp me.

title: 2BHK · "Fully Furnished Luxury Lure"
description: Stunning luxury 2BHK. Price heavily discounted as landlord resides in Singapore. High quality Italian marble, central AC. Direct owner deal. Secure the flat today by paying Rs 5000 holding deposit. Fully refundable if you do not like the flat.

title: 3BHK · "NRI Posh Penthouse"
description: High-end 3BHK penthouse available for rent. Owner settled in Dubai. Rent is extremely low at 29k because we need a neat tenant who can maintain the house. Need token deposit of 10k to hold as we have 15 families waiting. Direct deal.

title: 2BHK · "Urgent Relocation to USA"
address: CMH Road Metro Corridor, Indiranagar, Bangalore
description: My family is moving to the United States next Monday. Renting our premium 2BHK flat. All wood works and modular kitchen done. Rent only 17.5k. Pay nominal holding fee of 4k via GPay before visiting. Strictly no direct calls, text on WhatsApp.

title: 2BHK · "No-Brokerage Direct Offer"
description: Fully furnished 2 BHK apartment in outstanding condition. Direct owner listing, save huge brokerage fees. Landlord lives in Germany. WhatsApp direct for address details and token instructions. First person to transfer token gets occupancy.

title: 2BHK · "Posh TechPark Proximity"
address: ECC Road, Near ITPL, Whitefield, Bangalore
description: Super cozy 2BHK flat next to ITPL gate. Only 15k rent! Owner shifted to Mumbai for business. Send token deposit of Rs 4000 on GPay to fix viewing appointment. Fast deal.

title: 1BHK · "Cozy Corporate Flat"
description: Renting out beautiful, fully loaded 1BHK. Underpriced as owner resides in London. To generate visiting gate-pass, pay Rs 2500 online. Gate-pass fee fully refundable inside flat.

title: 2BHK · "Metro Walk-in Special"
description: Corporate professionals luxury 2BHK, 3 min walk to Metro. Rent heavily reduced due to owner moving to Chennai. High security building. Transfer Rs 3500 holding token to lock before someone else takes it.
